title: arachniodes ochropteroides
intro: Arachniodes ochropteroides, also known as the golden spleenwort or autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Arachniodes ochropteroides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
